{{Quote|Roger that!|Jielu, during the Battle of Hoth|<ref name="Entrenched">{{StoryCite|story=Entrenched|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}</ref>}}
'''Jielu''' was a member of the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military's]] [[4th Squad]], which was under the command of [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Jobin]], during the war against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], he was stationed at [[Echo Station 5-7/Legends|Echo Station 5-7]] in the beginning of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. They soon realized that the [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] was under attack by Imperial forces. He was given the order to stay and protect [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base's]] South Entrance by Jobin, while Jobin and some others went to the ion cannon.
